mnemonics: CREATE CONNECT TRANSACT: Create the Database, Connect to it, then perform Transactions.
keyPoints: Use SQLiteOpenHelper to create and manage the database.
getWritableDatabase() and getReadableDatabase() establish a connection.
Transactions (beginTransaction(), setTransactionSuccessful(), endTransaction()) ensure data integrity.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to call setTransactionSuccessful() before endTransaction(), which rolls back all changes.
Not closing database connections (Cursor, Database), leading to memory leaks.
